name: AB Sagax (publ)
summary: AB Sagax (publ) operates as a property company in Sweden, Finland, France, Germany, the Netherlands, Spain, and Denmark. The company invests in commercial properties primarily in the warehouse and light industry segment. As of December 31, 2020, its property portfolio consisted of 673 properties with a rental space of 3,480,000 square meters. AB Sagax (publ) is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
